// Worker:Features: Which features a standalone worker syncs. Each is on here by default; set one to false to disable it. A desktop-launched worker ignores this and takes the toggles from the desktop's Settings page over the key pipe.

Worker.// Intervals: Sync cadence for a standalone worker, as d.hh:mm:ss timespans. Account covers all account sections. Omit a key to use its default. A desktop-launched worker ignores this and takes intervals from Settings > Advanced over the pipe.
